item.title: Tree roots hang fell down, 25th June
item.description:
I'm on double deck bus SL3 and tree hang down and hit a big time before knock the bus roof off. Emergency need to cut it asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere and weeds need cutting, 25th June
item.description:
Theres rubbish all over the place from the bins and the grass/weeds need cutting Theres also a strong smell by the maisonettes from the rubbish that is left lying around where its rotting in the heat

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10A, Otlinge Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped household goods, 25th June
item.description:
Dumped household goods on public entrance to park on wood’s road … opposite John Donne school Please remove Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green space, 25th June
item.description:
There are over grown weeds, nettles , brushes that have not been maintained this year as they are growing and when public are trying walk they are being caught be these , a young child was caught in eye by this, greenery needs to be maintained as it’s public path that should regularly, only going get worse if not reported
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Road, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage and trash is still blocking access to controller. Controller has become a tipping site., 25th June

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 323, Kirkdale, Forest Hill, Greater London

item.title: Street light has been out for over a year, 25th June
item.description:
This street light out side number 54 Acton Street opposite the Bus Stop has been out for over a year now please can you investigate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Acton Street, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 25th June
item.description:
We found a dead fox in our garden. The advice from Hackney council was to move the animal from the garden to in-front the house and to get in contact with fix my street for cleanup. The fox has been placed inside a double layer black plastic bin bag.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New Sink Hole, 24th June
item.description:
A deep sink hole has just appeared in the road outside no. 5 Eltham Park Gardens, which is very dangerous right now and could become larger!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Park Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on pavement, 24th June
item.description:
Dead and decomposing fox on payment on right hand side, heading towards Blackfen Road, opposite number 2. Curled up in growth.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Fen Grove, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
